posts.text:
🚨BREAKING: @HeyTammyBruce just praised President Trump as "exactly the right man at the right time!"

"I trust him. It's easy to do with President Trump. He's transparent, he's clear, and he gets the job done."

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: An investigation was just LAUNCHED into Gavin Newsom's California after a video went viral of people being paid to sign petitions in the names of other voters.

I'm not surprised at all.

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Republican Sen. Mike Lee says he's "ALL FOR" Republicans TAKING OVER the Senate floor TOMORROW to force Democrats to publicly say why they're against Voter ID.

God bless @BasedMikeLee!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: @NickShirleyy just EXPOSED a $170-MILLION-DOLLAR fraud operation taking place in Gavin Newsom's California.

All fraudsters need ARRESTED!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: President Trump just UNLEASHED on supposed allies of the U.S. refusing to help the U.S. secure the Strait of Hormuz.

"...For 40 years we're protecting you and you don't want to get involved in something that is very minor?"

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: President Trump just said Ilhan Omar, Tim Walz, and Keith Ellison are "COMPLICIT" in the Minnesota fraud.

God bless Trump for working to expose these CRIMINALS!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: President Trump could BALNACE the national budget if illegal alien fraud is fully cut off, per Stephen Miller.

This needs to HAPPEN NOW!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Chuck Schumer just announced Senate Democrats are 100% dedicated to BLOCKING the SAVE America Act.

Republicans need to DITCH THE filibuster!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: High IQ DOGE genius Nathan Cavanaugh is going viral for REFUSING to bow to the radical Left's weaponized depositions.

God bless Nathan!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Some of the families of the Iranian women's soccer team are now MISSING and some have been DETAINED, per an Australian City Councilor.

Pray for these players and their families.

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: President Trump is set to be launching an ANTI-FRAUD TASK FORCE with VP JD Vance.

"This really going to establish a whole-of-government effort to fight fraud at both the state and federal level."

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Just days after attacking President Trump, actor Ben Stiller is YAWNING at new soda brand kick-off as he's completely ignored by the public.

No one cares about Trump-hating actors, Ben.

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: President Trump just said he doesn't do it for politics, he does "what's right."

"Political impacts, sure, everybody has concern. I have to do what's right."

God bless Trump.

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: President Trump just UNLEASHED on a fake news ABC reporter:

"One of the worst, most fake, most corrupt - You know what, ABC News? It may be the most corrupt news organizations on the planet! I think they're terrible!"

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Conan O’Brien just called out pedophiles at the 2026 Oscars.

“A British spokesperson said, ‘Yeah, well, at least we arrest our pedophiles.’”

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: President Trump is now flying back to Washington, D.C. as a MAJORITY OF AMERICANS approve of his strike on Iran by +10 points, per McLaughlin.

We the People STAND WITH TRUMP!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: The US just BEAT CANADA AGAIN at hockey and won a GOLD MEDAL at the 2026 Winter Paralympics.

With President Trump in charge, the USA just can't stop winning!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Pro-Trump Iranian Americans just DROWNED OUT Leftist protestors with a "Make Iran Great Again" march in NYC.

We the People LOVE TRUMP!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: A Maine high school was just SUED by a patriotic father after they didn't allow students to recite the U.S. National Anthem.

God bless this father!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Virginia Sheriff Stacey Kincaid was just EXPOSED for shielding an illegal alien from ICE who has groped school girls at least 9 TIMES in past months.

This "Sheriff" needs to be arrested!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video
